summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Portuguese Maritime Police system with 10 implemented changes. All backend APIs are working perfectly (8/8 tests passed). Frontend testing confirmed most key features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/servicos auto-generates numero_controlo as YEAR/NNNN (2026/0002)
Backend: GET /api/atividades returns stored activities (1 activity found)
Backend: GET /api/relatorio with filters works (returned 3 services)
Backend: GET /api/servicos supports data_inicio and data_fim params
Backend: Dashboard stats API working (Total=4, Navios=3, Policiamentos=1)
Frontend: Dashboard loads and shows numero_controlo in recent services table
Frontend: Services table shows N. Controlo column prominently displayed
Frontend: Services table has date range filters (data_inicio and data_fim)
Frontend: Services table clear filters button works
Frontend: Navigate to Relatório from sidebar works
Frontend: Navios form shows SR - São Roque do Pico in dropdown
Frontend: Navios form has combined 'Escala de Navios - Servicos e Agentes' section
Frontend: Text inputs convert to uppercase (confirmed in multiple forms)
Frontend: Relatorio page loads with all filters (Tipo, Comando, Atividade, Data range, Utente)
Frontend: Relatorio page search functionality available
Visual confirmation: Recent services show mix of old (CTRL002) and new (2026/0001) numero_controlo formats
Visual confirmation: SR appears correctly in services table as expected location code
